plugins.name: haiku-scout
plugins.description: Low-cost codebase mapping agent using Haiku for fast exploration

plugins.name: self-learning
plugins.description: Capture structural insights and patterns before they're lost

plugins.name: doc-pipeline
plugins.description: 4-tier documentation pipeline: fetch → scout (Haiku) → process (Sonnet) → audit (Opus) → PDF

plugins.name: permission-manager
plugins.description: Configure Claude Code permission rules (allow/deny/ask) in settings.json to enable or restrict autonomous execution

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Tiered subagent research pipeline: scout (Haiku) → analyst (Sonnet) → auditor (Opus)

plugins.name: text-to-audio
plugins.description: Convert documents to conversational audio via local TTS. Slash command: /generate-audio

plugins.name: permission-notify
plugins.description: Delayed Discord notifications for permission prompts — only pings if user doesn't respond within timeout
